title: LlamaCppRuntime end-to-end integration smoke test (load + generate + LoRA + KV + spec-decode)
goal: End-to-end integration test exercising the full LlamaCppRuntime surface on a representative GGUF: load, generate, mount LoRA, generate with override, switch KV quant, prefix-share commit/restore, self-spec ngram, unload. Test gated by HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH env var.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/tests/llama_cpp_e2e_smoke.rs with a single integration test orchestrating the full path; CI documentation note in tests/README.json (NOT .md) describing how to populate the env var.
implementation_notes: Smoke test scenario: (1) load fixture GGUF (operator-supplied via HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH); (2) assert capabilities { supports_lora=true, supports_kv_quantization=Q4Q8Mix, supports_speculative_draft=true, supports_activation_steering=false, supports_subquadratic=false, supports_eagle3=false }; (3) generate 32 tokens with seed=42 — capture output; (4) mount fixture LoRA (HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_PATH env, skip subtest if absent), generate again with override, assert output differs; (5) switch KV quant from f16 to q4, generate, assert no crash; (6) prefix_commit on a 20-token prompt, generate continuation, prefix_restore, generate same continuation, assert deterministic; (7) ngram self-spec generate (mode=Ngram{lookback=4, max_draft=4}) 32 tokens, assert output matches non-spec generation; (8) score a 10-token sequence, assert total_logprob negative finite; (9) embed (skipped if model loaded without embeddings=true); (10) unload, assert ledger row terminated, assert models map empty. All steps log FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-* events; test asserts at least 1 of each expected event family was emitted. Smoke test is the contract gate before any LlamaCppRuntime change merges. README.json: { test_id: "llama_cpp_e2e_smoke", required_env: ["HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH", "HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_PATH (optional)"], description: "..." }.
risk_if_missed: Regression in any LlamaCppRuntime sub-feature ships undetected; no integration evidence for AC-LLAMACPP-ADAPTER.
validator_focus: All 10 steps executed when env var present; gracefully skipped when absent (test reports skip, not fail); FR event family coverage verified.

minimum_controls: Skip path documented (test reports skip status, does not panic when env absent).
All 10 sub-steps present and assert; no commented-out steps.
FR event family coverage explicitly verified per family.
